assets.name: idle
assets.description: Gina standing, gentle idle (breathing / small bob).

assets.name: walking
assets.description: Gina walking cycle, side view (faces east; the engine mirrors it for west).

assets.name: talking
assets.description: Gina's beak-moving talk loop. For read-along lip-sync this can grow to a 7-frame mouth-shape sheet (X A B C D E F, see SPEECH.md); 3 frames stay fine as a classic loop.

assets.name: dragged
assets.description: Gina held mid-air by the pointer: dangling, legs paddling (loops). Until this sheet lands the game shows her idle sheet while dragged (LIVELINESS.md Part 2).

assets.name: falling
assets.description: Gina flutter-falling after being dropped: quick comedic wing flaps (loops while she descends).

assets.name: landing
assets.description: Touchdown beat: a little squat and feather puff (plays once, then back to idle).

assets.name: peck
assets.description: Idle fidget (LIVELINESS.md Part 1): head down, two pecks at the ground, head up (plays once).

assets.name: headshake
assets.description: Idle fidget: a quick left-right feather ruffle (plays once).

assets.name: blink
assets.description: Idle fidget: eyelids close and open (plays once).

assets.name: shade_reminder
assets.text: Devo mettere la crema solare prima di uscire dall'ombra!
assets.description: Refuses to leave the umbrella's shade before sunscreen.

assets.name: sunscreen_done
assets.description: Taps the bottle again after applying sunscreen.

assets.name: got_goggles
assets.description: Collects the goggles.

assets.name: float_blows_away
assets.text: Oh no! Il vento ha portato il salvagente sull'albero!
assets.description: A gust carries the pool float into the tree.

assets.name: need_goggles
assets.text: Mi servono gli occhialini per tuffarmi.
assets.description: Tries to dive without the goggles.

assets.name: float_by_pool
assets.text: Mi serve il salvagente: e' li' vicino alla piscina.
assets.description: Tries to dive while the float is still by the pool.

assets.name: float_in_tree
assets.text: Il salvagente e' sull'albero! Devo recuperarlo.
assets.description: Tries to dive while the float is stuck in the tree.

assets.name: dive_again
assets.description: Splashes in and wants to go again (adventure replays).

assets.name: sunscreen_ready
assets.text: Pronta! Ora posso uscire al sole!
assets.description: Back at the pool after the sunscreen minigame: she can now go play in the sun.

assets.name: cant_reach
assets.description: Looks at the float stuck in the branches.

assets.name: need_help
assets.description: Second look at the stuck float.

assets.name: ask_carla
assets.description: Third look — thinks of asking Carla the crow.

assets.name: hi_carla
assets.description: Greets Carla when the float is not stuck.

assets.name: carla_offer
assets.text: Ti aiuto se mi porti dell'uva. Prendi questo cestino!
assets.description: Carla's deal, in Gina's voice: grapes for the float, here's a basket.

assets.name: carla_reminder
assets.text: Hai gia' il cestino? Portami l'uva dalla vigna!
assets.description: Carla reminds Gina to bring grapes.

assets.name: carla_thanks
assets.text: Mmm, che uva buona! Ecco il tuo salvagente!
assets.description: Carla takes the grapes and returns the float.

assets.name: already_grapes
assets.description: The basket already holds grapes.

assets.name: nothing_to_pick
assets.description: No basket yet, so nothing to gather grapes with.

assets.name: basket_full
assets.text: Cestino pieno d'uva! Ora torno da Carla.
assets.description: Back at the vine with the basket full: time to bring Carla the grapes.

assets.name: background

assets.name: background

assets.name: grape
assets.description: A single grape for the picking minigame.

assets.name: celebration
assets.description: Completion reward burst over Gina's close-up (plays once with the chime). Placeholder confetti via tools/gen_celebration_sheet.py.

assets.name: celebration
assets.description: Completion reward burst over the picked bunch (plays once with the chime). Placeholder confetti via tools/gen_celebration_sheet.py.

assets.name: chime
assets.description: Success chime both minigames play on completion. Placeholder arpeggio via tools/gen_chime.py.

assets.name: sunscreen_boil
assets.description: Placeholder boil for the sunscreen bottle (replaced file-for-file by traced frames).

assets.name: goggles_boil
assets.description: Placeholder boil for the goggles.

assets.name: float_boil
assets.description: Placeholder boil for the pool float.

assets.name: voice
assets.description: Per-scene silent voice placeholder (replaced by per-line WAVs as recordings land).

assets.name: wind
assets.description: The gust that carries the float into the tree.

assets.name: splash
assets.description: The dive splash.

assets.name: walking
assets.description: Gina's footstep loop (the ActorSpec move sound).

assets.name: float_boil
assets.description: Placeholder boil for the float stuck in the branches.

assets.name: carla_boil
assets.description: Placeholder boil for Carla the crow.

assets.name: caw
assets.description: Carla's caw.
